description_long: This is a compact, freestanding cast iron wood-burning stove with a matte black finish, featuring two round, cream-colored burner plates on the top surface. The front face includes a rectangular oven door with a handle, a smaller circular control or access panel, and a lower drawer, all with visible hinges and latches. A vertical stovepipe extends from the rear center of the top, designed for venting smoke upward. The sides and back are plain, with the left and right sides showing the profile of the burner plates and stovepipe. The legs are short and sturdy, elevating the stove slightly above the ground. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, suitable for practical use in urban or rustic settings.
description: A compact, black cast iron wood-burning stove with two cream burner plates, a front oven door, and a vertical stovepipe. The design is sturdy and functional, with minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the oven door, control panel, lower drawer, and both burner plates on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the two burner plates and the stovepipe, with minimal visible detail on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the central stovepipe, with both burner plates visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the burner plates and stovepipe, with hinges of the oven door slightly visible.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel consists of a small circular access or control panel on the front, likely a rotary knob or latch, with no visible digital or touchscreen elements. The layout is minimal, with controls integrated into the front face and labeled only by their physical form.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a simple, horizontally mounted, cylindrical bar made of metal, protruding slightly from the door for easy gripping. It appears robust and functional, with no decorative features.
